item.title: github-code Web Component 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison built an experimental Web Component called 'github-code' using GPT-5.5. It embeds code from GitHub by converting URLs to raw.githubusercontent.com links, fetching the file, and displaying a specified line range with line numbers but no syntax highlighting. The component is demonstrated with a prompt that shows how to use it via a custom HTML tag. It was created as a quick experiment leveraging AI to generate functional web components.
标签: web-components, github, GPT, AI, code-embedding, experimental, open-source, javascript, html, tools

item.title: sqlite-migrate 0.2 摘要
item.description:
sqlite-migrate 0.2 is a release that effectively retires the library by implementing a compatibility shim against the new sqlite-utils 4.0 dependency. This version ensures continued functionality while transitioning users to the updated dependency.
标签: sqlite-migrate, sqlite-utils, release, compatibility, dependency, python, database, migration

item.title: Let AI Burn 摘要
item.description:
The author argues that the AI industry is a bubble built on hype, circular financing, and manufactured consent, not genuine value. Generative AI is described as unprofitable, hallucination-prone, and inessential to the economy, with most revenue coming from OpenAI and Anthropic's own compute spend. The piece criticizes big tech's massive capex on AI without proven ROI, compares the situation unfavorably to the Dot Com bubble (noting GPUs are less reusable than fiber), and calls for no bailouts. It also attacks the cult-like behavior around AI companies and their leaders.
标签: AI, bubble, critique, finance, tech industry, generative AI, capex, hype, Silicon Valley, economics

item.title: sqlite-utils 4.0, now with database schema migrations 摘要
item.description:
sqlite-utils 4.0, the 124th release and first major version bump since 3.0 in 2020, introduces three major features: database migrations, nested transactions via db.atomic(), and compound foreign keys. Migrations are defined in Python files using the sqlite-utils library, leveraging table.transform() for enhanced alter table capabilities. The _sqlite_migrations table tracks applied migrations. The design originated from the sqlite-migrate package, now integrated into sqlite-utils. The release also includes minor breaking changes and improvements to transaction handling.
标签: sqlite-utils, database, migrations, SQLite, Python, schema, transactions, open-source, release, datasette

item.title: Our mixed building network wiring and its consequences 摘要
item.description:
A university department's network infrastructure is mixed but primarily 1G Ethernet, with older buildings wired with Cat-5 cable supporting only 1G. Over time, 100 MBit switches were replaced with 1G switches, though most lack 10G uplinks. Renovations now include Cat-6/6A wiring certified for 10G-T, but 10G switches are only deployed when funded. Many users rely on wireless instead of wired connections. The author advises against using 100 MBit in 2026 due to untested hardware and recommends 1G as the minimum speed.
标签: networking, Ethernet, university, infrastructure, wiring, gigabit, 10G, wireless, legacy, sysadmin
